name: Sera and Emily | New outfits
description:
【New Outfits】

Sera is a seraphim angel and a supporting antagonist in Hazbin Hotel who made her debut in "Welcome to Heaven". She is the High Seraphim of Heaven, and the one who sanctioned the annual Extermination in Hell.

Emily is a seraphim angel and a supporting character who made her debut in "Welcome to Heaven", And she is also one of the characters who supports Charlie Morningstar and her idea of helping sinners redeem themselves so that they can ascend to Heaven.

Image Artist: Dryvial
creator: THE_honored_ONE
